inputs: ISL loop: init x = 0; cond x < 5; inc x++; body print(x);
ISL loop: init i = 1; cond i <= 10; inc i+=2; body print(i);
ISL loop: init y = 10; cond y > 0; inc y--; body print(y);
ISL loop: init a = 5; cond a != 0; inc a/=2; body print(a);
ISL loop: init b = 100; cond b >= 50; inc b-=10; body print(b);
outputs: Python code: x = 0; while x < 5: print(x); x+=1;
Python code: i = 1; while i <= 10: print(i); i+=2;
Python code: y = 10; while y > 0: print(y); y-=1;
Python code: a = 5; while a != 0: print(a); a/=2;
Python code: b = 100; while b >= 50: print(b); b-=10;
